name: cartographer
description: End-to-end trace explorer and debugger for XCM.

scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm coverage && pnpm depcheck && pnpm build
scripts.xcm:cli: pnpm run live:check:cli && pnpm build && node scripts/cartographer-live.mjs run-cli
scripts.xcm:test: pnpm run live:check:client && vitest run src/client/dry-run.it.test.ts

comment: Dependency version ranges are starting points — verify latest stable and pin exact versions before committing a lockfile. polkadot-api (PAPI) is the chain client per ADR-0002.
